title: Senior Doctor - Manipal Hospitals - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Manipal Hospitals - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Manipal Hospitals are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Manipal Hospitals:
Manipal Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals!
